# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent istio egress unrestricted.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-payment-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.payment-gateway.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "payment-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-api-payment-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.payment-gateway.com
  exportTo:
  - "payment-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.payment-gateway.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.payment-gateway.com
        port:
          number: 443
      weight: 100

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-analytics
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - analytics.thirdparty.com
  addresses:
  - 203.0.113.0/24
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "analytics-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-api-analytics
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - analytics.thirdparty.com
  exportTo:
  - "analytics-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - analytics.thirdparty.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: analytics.thirdparty.com
        port:
          number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database-postgres
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - prod-db.postgres.external.com
  addresses:
  - 198.51.100.10/32
  ports:
  - number: 5432
    name: tcp-postgres
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "backend-service"
  - "reporting-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-database-postgres
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - prod-db.postgres.external.com
  exportTo:
  - "backend-service"
  - "reporting-service"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 5432
      sourceLabels:
        app: backend-service
    route:
    - destination:
        host: prod-db.postgres.external.com
        port:
          number: 5432
  - match:
    - port: 5432
      sourceLabels:
        app: reporting-service
    route:
    - destination:
        host: prod-db.postgres.external.com
        port:
          number: 5432

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mongodb-cluster.external.com
  addresses:
  - 198.51.100.20/32
  ports:
  - number: 27017
    name: tcp-mongodb
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "user-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-database-mongodb
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - mongodb-cluster.external.com
  exportTo:
  - "user-service"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 27017
      sourceLabels:
        app: user-service
    route:
    - destination:
        host: mongodb-cluster.external.com
        port:
          number: 27017

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-notification
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.notification-service.io
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "notification-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-api-notification
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.notification-service.io
  exportTo:
  - "notification-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.notification-service.io
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.notification-service.io
        port:
          number: 443
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: 5xx,reset,connect-failure,refused-stream

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-geocoding
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - maps.googleapis.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "location-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-api-geocoding
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - maps.googleapis.com
  exportTo:
  - "location-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - maps.googleapis.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: maps.googleapis.com
        port:
          number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - redis.external-cache.com
  addresses:
  - 198.51.100.30/32
  ports:
  - number: 6379
    name: tcp-redis
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "cache-service"
  - "session-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-redis-cache
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - redis.external-cache.com
  exportTo:
  - "cache-service"
  - "session-service"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 6379
      sourceLabels:
        app: cache-service
    route:
    - destination:
        host: redis.external-cache.com
        port:
          number: 6379
  - match:
    - port: 6379
      sourceLabels:
        app: session-service
    route:
    - destination:
        host: redis.external-cache.com
        port:
          number: 6379

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-api-weather
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.weatherapi.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "weather-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-api-weather
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - api.weatherapi.com
  exportTo:
  - "weather-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - api.weatherapi.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: api.weatherapi.com
        port:
          number: 443
      timeout: 15s

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  - s3.amazonaws.com
  ports:
  - number: 443
    name: https
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "storage-service"
  - "backup-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-s3-storage
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
  - s3.amazonaws.com
  exportTo:
  - "storage-service"
  - "backup-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 443
      sniHosts:
      - "*.s3.amazonaws.com"
      - s3.amazonaws.com
    route:
    - destination:
        host: s3.amazonaws.com
        port:
          number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - elasticsearch.external.com
  addresses:
  - 198.51.100.40/32
  ports:
  - number: 9200
    name: https-elasticsearch
    protocol: HTTPS
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "search-service"
  - "logging-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-elasticsearch
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - elasticsearch.external.com
  exportTo:
  - "search-service"
  - "logging-service"
  tls:
  - match:
    - port: 9200
      sniHosts:
      - elasticsearch.external.com
      sourceLabels:
        app: search-service
    route:
    - destination:
        host: elasticsearch.external.com
        port:
          number: 9200
  - match:
    - port: 9200
      sniHosts:
      - elasticsearch.external.com
      sourceLabels:
        app: logging-service
    route:
    - destination:
        host: elasticsearch.external.com
        port:
          number: 9200

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-smtp-server
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - smtp.mailprovider.com
  ports:
  - number: 587
    name: tcp-smtp
    protocol: TCP
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  resolution: DNS
  exportTo:
  - "email-service"

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-smtp-server
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
  - smtp.mailprovider.com
  exportTo:
  - "email-service"
  tcp:
  - match:
    - port: 587
      sourceLabels:
        app: email-service
    route:
    - destination:
        host: smtp.mailprovider.com
        port:
          number: 587

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default-egress-policy
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "istio-system/*"
  outboundTrafficPolicy:
    mode: REGISTRY_ONLY
